GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=44739242
  GpuFilterExec: predicate=l_quantity@1 > Some(3000),15,2
    GpuScanExec: batch_size=44739242
--- memory ---
total_estimate_cost=120
GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=24, subtree_max_row_bytes=48, estimate_input_bytes=24, estimate_output_bytes=24, estimate_cost=48
  GpuFilterExec: row_width=24, subtree_max_row_bytes=48, estimate_input_bytes=24, estimate_output_bytes=24, estimate_cost=48
    GpuScanExec: row_width=24, subtree_max_row_bytes=24, estimate_input_bytes=0, estimate_output_bytes=24, estimate_cost=24
